output.dependency: The flight identifier appears to determine a set of related flight schedule values: a specific route-coded flight number is associated with departure and arrival times shown in two different formats, where the same flight record consistently carries the same scheduled/actual time information.

The time-related fields appear dependent on one another syntactically: one pair uses compact date-time strings (time plus month/day), while the other pair uses more readable clock times, suggesting they represent corresponding scheduled and actual times for the same trip.
